templates.expositionText: I've had this recipe stuck in my head for three days now and it won't leave me alone. I need {gather_count} {quest_item} to make it happen.
templates.acceptText: Sure, I'll grab some for you.
templates.expositionTurnInText: Perfect: tonight I'm cooking.
templates.rewardText: a home-cooked meal and my thanks

templates.expositionText: I've been dying to eat some {quest_item} but I haven't had a chance to go out and get any. Could you bring me {gather_count}?
templates.acceptText: I'll see what I can find.
templates.declineText: You'll have to find someone else.
templates.expositionTurnInText: Oh, wonderful. I've been thinking about this all day.
templates.resolutionText: Thank you so much. Take this: {quest_reward}.
templates.rewardText: a jar of preserves from my cupboard

templates.expositionText: I promised {settlement_npc} I'd bring something nice for dinner tonight, but my cupboard's bare. Would you get me {gather_count} {quest_item}?
templates.expositionTurnInText: Now I won't show up empty-handed. {settlement_npc} would never let me hear the end of it.
templates.rewardText: a pouch of dried herbs I've been saving

templates.expositionText: Workshop's running low. I need {gather_count} {quest_item} before I can get back to work.
templates.expositionTurnInText: Good: that should keep me going for a while.
templates.rewardText: a sturdy leather pouch, well-made

templates.expositionText: I'm almost out of {quest_item} and I've got orders to fill. I could use {gather_count} if you're willing.
templates.expositionTurnInText: That'll do nicely. Back to it, then.
templates.rewardText: a set of polished bone buttons

templates.expositionText: I went to grab {quest_item} this morning and the bin was empty. Could you round up {gather_count} for me?
templates.expositionTurnInText: Perfect. I'll get these sorted right away.
templates.rewardText: a small jar of beeswax salve

templates.expositionText: Could you grab {gather_count} {quest_item} for me? My back's not what it was and the walk would do me in.
templates.expositionTurnInText: Ah, just what I needed. You're quicker than I'd have been.
templates.rewardText: a warm knitted scarf

templates.expositionText: I promised I'd have {quest_item} ready by this afternoon, but I can't leave the shop. Any chance you could bring me {gather_count}?
templates.expositionTurnInText: You're a natural. I'll have these put to use right away.
templates.rewardText: a carved wooden trinket box

templates.expositionText: I've been meaning to gather {gather_count} {quest_item} all week, but things keep coming up. Would you mind?
templates.declineText: I've got my own things to do.
templates.expositionTurnInText: Finally. I've been putting this off for too long.
templates.rewardText: a bundle of dried wildflowers

templates.expositionText: I've always wanted to see what {quest_item} looks like up close. Bring me {gather_count} and let me have a proper look?
templates.expositionTurnInText: Oh, fascinating. I see why people make a fuss over these.
templates.rewardText: an old coin with an unusual stamp

templates.expositionText: I want to try something. Bring me {gather_count} {quest_item}: I've got an idea that might actually work.
templates.expositionTurnInText: Excellent. Let's see if this idea holds up.
templates.resolutionText: That was worth it. {quest_reward} for your trouble.
templates.rewardText: a smooth river stone, painted with care

templates.expositionText: {settlement_npc} told me {quest_item} has all sorts of uses I never knew about. Could you get me {gather_count}? I want to find out for myself.
templates.expositionTurnInText: Let's see what all the talk is about.
templates.resolutionText: I learned something today. {quest_reward}: take it.
templates.rewardText: a small hand-drawn map of the area

templates.expositionText: I left my {quest_item} somewhere last week and I've been kicking myself ever since. I think {target_npc} over in {target_npc_settlement} might have found it.
templates.expositionTurnInText: You actually found it. I can't believe I let that wander off.
templates.rewardText: a tin of hard candies I keep for special occasions
templates.targetNpcOpener: Oh, you're here about that {quest_item}? Yeah, I've got it right here. Figured someone would come looking eventually.
templates.targetNpcCloser: Tell them to keep better track of their things. Safe travels.

templates.expositionText: I can't find my {quest_item} anywhere. Last I remember, I had it when I visited {target_npc} in {target_npc_settlement}. Could you ask if they've seen it?
templates.expositionTurnInText: That's a relief. I was starting to think it was gone for good.
templates.rewardText: a spool of fine thread, hard to come by
templates.targetNpcOpener: The {quest_item}? It's been sitting on my shelf. I was wondering whose it was. Here you go.
templates.targetNpcCloser: Glad to get it off my hands, honestly. Take care.

templates.expositionText: Embarrassing, but I left my {quest_item} at {target_npc}'s place in {target_npc_settlement}. I keep meaning to go back for it but I never get around to it.
templates.acceptText: I'll swing by and grab it.
templates.declineText: You should go get it yourself.
templates.expositionTurnInText: There it is. I missed this more than I expected.
templates.resolutionText: You did me a real kindness. {quest_reward}.
templates.rewardText: a jar of last season's honey
templates.targetNpcOpener: Right, the {quest_item}. I kept it safe: figured they'd want it back eventually. Here.
templates.targetNpcCloser: No trouble at all. See you around.

templates.expositionText: I've been waiting on a {quest_item} from {target_npc} in {target_npc_settlement}. It should be ready by now. Would you mind picking it up?
templates.expositionTurnInText: That's exactly what I was expecting. Looks good.
templates.rewardText: a pair of warm wool socks
templates.targetNpcOpener: You're picking up for someone in {settlement_name}? Right: the {quest_item}. It's all ready. Here you are.

templates.expositionText: {target_npc} was supposed to send over a {quest_item}, but it never showed up. Could you go to {target_npc_settlement} and grab it for me?
templates.expositionTurnInText: Finally. I'd started to wonder if they forgot about me.
templates.rewardText: a small block of scented soap
templates.targetNpcOpener: Oh: was I supposed to send that over? My mistake. Here's the {quest_item}. All yours.
templates.targetNpcCloser: Sorry about the wait. Safe trip back.

templates.expositionText: I asked {target_npc} to set aside a {quest_item} for me at their place in {target_npc_settlement}. I just haven't had the time to go get it. Could you?
templates.expositionTurnInText: Just what I needed. Thank you for making the trip.
templates.resolutionText: You saved me half a day's walk. Here: {quest_reward}.
templates.rewardText: a packet of roasted seeds for the road
templates.targetNpcOpener: Ah, you're here for the {quest_item}. I've had it set aside. Here, take it.
templates.targetNpcCloser: Happy to help. Have a good one.

templates.expositionText: I lent my {quest_item} to {target_npc} ages ago and I'd really like it back. They're over in {target_npc_settlement}: would you ask them for it?
templates.expositionTurnInText: There it is. Feels good to have it back.
templates.rewardText: a small clay figurine I made myself
templates.targetNpcOpener: The {quest_item}? Oh, right. I've been meaning to return that. Sorry it took so long: here you go.
templates.targetNpcCloser: Tell them no hard feelings, yeah? Take care.

templates.expositionText: {target_npc} borrowed my {quest_item} a while back. I don't think they realize how long it's been. Could you swing by {target_npc_settlement} and bring it home?
templates.expositionTurnInText: Finally. I was starting to forget what it looked like.
templates.resolutionText: Thank you: I didn't want to make it awkward. {quest_reward}.
templates.rewardText: a bundle of cinnamon sticks
templates.targetNpcOpener: Has it really been that long? I completely lost track. Here's the {quest_item}: good as new. Mostly.
templates.targetNpcCloser: Give them my apologies. Safe travels.

templates.expositionText: I hate to be that person, but {target_npc} still has my {quest_item}. I lent it out meaning to get it back in a week. That was months ago. They're in {target_npc_settlement}.
templates.declineText: Maybe just write them a letter.
templates.expositionTurnInText: At last. I was running out of ways to politely not mention it.
templates.rewardText: a pressed flower bookmark
templates.targetNpcOpener: Oh no: the {quest_item}. I kept telling myself I'd bring it back. I'm terrible. Here, please take it.
templates.targetNpcCloser: I feel awful. Tell them I'm sorry. Really.
